name: Ungoogled Chromium
short_description: Google Chromium, sans dependency on Google web services.
description: Ungoogled Chromium is a community fork of the Chromium web browser that removes all connections to Google services. This is a container of Ungoogled Chromium built by linuxserver.io that allows running a sandboxed instance of it in another browser.
usecases: Visit websites you aren't sure about in a sandbox
Use the same session on multiple devices
Sign into alternate accounts without altering your main browser
notes: Exposing this container to the Internet is not recommended.
Using the `jpeg` encoder setting in the Selkies sidebar under Video Options is recommended for smoother video.
